g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a developer do in the InfraGPT workflow?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the InfraGPT GitHub repo?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the Checkout stage of Jenkins?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the Docker Build stage?')
sendPrompt('What does Trivy scan for in the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does Jenkins push to DockerHub?')
sendPrompt('What does Terraform apply create in AWS?')
sendPrompt('What does the Deploy to EKS stage do?')
sendPrompt('How does Kubernetes HPA autoscaling work in InfraGPT?')
sendPrompt('What is a rolling update with zero downtime?')
sendPrompt('What does Prometheus scrape in InfraGPT?')
sendPrompt('What dashboards does Grafana show for InfraGPT?')
sendPrompt('How do users access InfraGPT on the internet?')
sendPrompt('What does a user see when they open InfraGPT?')
